Environmental Protection.summary: Warner has consistently supported climate action and clean energy legislation including the Inflation Reduction Act.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with clean energy funding (Senate vote, August 2021)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Warner has supported bipartisan criminal justice reform efforts including sentencing reform.

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Warner supports abortion rights and voted for federal protections.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Warner has supported LGBTQ+ rights legislation including marriage equality.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Kaine has supported progressive tax measures and opposed tax cuts for the wealthy.

voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Kaine supports abortion rights and has voted for federal protections.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Kaine supports LGBTQ+ rights and marriage equality.
